text: {"verdicts": [{"commitment_id": 1, "new_status": "met", "reason": "Daniel Cho confirmed Cirrus Analytics acquisition closed 'on schedule in the final week of fiscal Q3, exactly as we committed.'"},{"commitment_id": 2, "new_status": "still_open", "reason": "Management reaffirmed the Q4 2026 GA target for native Cirrus query capabilities; deadline has not yet arrived."},{"commitment_id": 3, "new_status": "still_open", "reason": "transcript does not address this commitment"},{"commitment_id": 4, "new_status": "still_open", "reason": "Helena Vargas confirmed Q3 margin of 19.2% puts Nimbus 'on track' for full-year ~19% non-GAAP margin; FY2026 not yet complete."},{"commitment_id": 5, "new_status": "missed", "reason": "Helena Vargas explicitly stated GAAP operating income will be 'slightly negative' at -$25M to -$40M for FY2026, directly missing the commitment."},{"commitment_id": 6, "new_status": "still_open", "reason": "transcript does not address this commitment"},{"commitment_id": 7, "new_status": "missed", "reason": "Daniel Cho stated Stratus Copilot will not hit Q4 2026 GA, now expected in 'fiscal Q2 2027' due to architectural changes."},{"commitment_id": 8, "new_status": "still_open", "reason": "Helena Vargas said EMEA is improving and mid-single-digit Q4 growth is 'increasingly confident' but achievable; deadline not yet arrived."},{"commitment_id": 10, "new_status": "still_open", "reason": "Helena Vargas reaffirmed expectation to 'fully exhaust the 500 million dollar authorisation by the end of fiscal 2026'; FY2026 not yet complete."},{"commitment_id": 11, "new_status": "still_open", "reason": "Helena Vargas confirmed 'we will revisit the authorisation level at the beginning of fiscal 2027'; deadline not yet arrived."},{"commitment_id": 12, "new_status": "still_open", "reason": "transcript does not address this commitment"}]}
